About & FAQ

TQ SDE Complements

Comparing Singularity_Previous (Build: 3195451) to Singularity_Next (Build: 3246005)

Want to be notified of new patches? Hop into #hoboleaks on Tweetfleet Slack! Instructions on how to join Tweetfleet Slack here.
Please note that Singularity will be kept inaccessible except for specific testing windows, and may fall significantly behind Tranquility in patches. The Tranquility/Singularity diff (homepage) may not be particularly useful for the time being. Refer to the latest Tranquility patches instead.

Find Hoboleaks useful and want to provide some support at no additional cost to yourself?
Use affiliate code HL (short for HoboLeaks) the next time you make a purchase through the official EVE store, which has Omega, PLEX, and much more. The small commission we receive helps Hoboleaks remain ad-free. Thank you! ♥

91986 - Momentous Churn - Limited A license for the single use of a pattern in SKIN sequencing, once activated and inside your SKINR collection.

1036208 Success in business requires sacrifice, speed, and discipline. Do not fear the competition, for leaders rise and fall. Set your goals, maintain the course, and let the fires of change that lick at your heels announce your arrival.

- Alakoni Ishanoya, CEO of LAI Dai Corporation		 Success in business requires sacrifice, speed, and discipline. Do not fear the competition, for leaders rise and fall. Set your goals, maintain the course, and let the fires of change that lick at your heels announce your arrival.

- Alakoni Ishanoya, CEO of LAI Dai Corporation
